Javascript.HintText: Check box if endorsement on order is required

Context.isEnabled: if (null != WP && null != WP.GetScreenProcess && null != WP.GetScreenProcess()) { return checkSolicitorForSubject(); } return false;
if (null != WP && null != WP.GetScreenProcess && null != WP.GetScreenProcess()) { return checkSolicitorForSubject(); } return false;
